text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While Hishi Akebono tries to track down me
down, Taiki Shuttle compliments her on how
unique and singular her running style is.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Akebono nods with immediate
understanding. She grabs me and takes me to the
kitchen... and immediately starts making chanko!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There, she tells me that she wants keep racing as
the big, powerful Hishi Akebono that her fans
want to see.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even if her career is cut short, she wants to
protect her flavor. The chanko she serves me is
the same, delicious flavor as always.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There's something special about eating food
that's so familiar. We decide to prepare for the
Mile Ch. without changing her running style!
